Overrides.Override: Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
5% chance to Hinder Enemies on Hit with Spells
Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Grim Hold Helical Ring Unique ID: 02e38e69a2a6517e2b61869edfe13ffea38f07751f280fc0a6a4b771da340e5a Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 4 -2 Prefix Modifiers allowed +1 Suffix Modifier allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 50% increased Suffix Modifier magnitudes {fractured}102% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected 44% increased Rarity of Items found +18% to all Elemental Resistances Left ring slot: Skills supported by Unleash have +1 to maximum number of Seals Right ring slot: Shockwave has +1 to Cooldown Uses {crafted}25% increased Global Physical Damage {crafted}27% increased Chaos Damage
